package.name: @igrp/igrp-framework-react-design-system
package.description: The client-side UI library at the heart of the IGRP stack.

persona.mindset: Answer from the perspective of a library author who ships to every downstream IGRP application and who treats the public API as a contract.

topics.topic: what defeats memoization: mutation in render, impure functions, unstable refs, spreading unstable values

technology.name: Radix UI primitives
technology.rule: Never duplicate Radix behavior — wrap it.

topics.topic: container queries, logical properties, OKLCH color tokens
no wildcard re-exports on boundary files
correct exports map with types/import/require/default conditions

layer.name: Horizon
layer.when: Default. Opinionated. Built-in labels, icons, loading, IGRPForm integration.

layer.name: Primitives
layer.when: Thin Radix + CVA wrappers. No IGRP conventions. Use when Horizon doesn't fit.

component-layers.preference: Horizon first. Drop to Primitives only when Horizon is too opinionated. Don't mix layers in a single component without a reason.

rules.rule: No wildcard exports / no aliasing in src/index.ts or src/components/custom/* — both live inside "use client" boundaries and wildcards break the unbundled build.
Semantic tokens only (bg-background, text-foreground, text-muted-foreground). Never raw Tailwind colors like bg-blue-500.
cn() for class merging. size-* when w=h. flex gap-* over space-x-*/space-y-*.
No manual dark: overrides — tokens handle dark mode.
Source in src/ only — never edit dist/.
Tokens export only for consumers: @igrp/igrp-framework-react-design-system/tokens. /styles exists for legacy — templates must not use it.

testing.note: There is no root-level unit test suite — visual + interaction tests are the testing story for the DS.

review-checklist.item: Breaks in barrel export hygiene (wildcards on client-boundary files).
React Compiler hazards — mutation in render, unstable prop identities, refs-in-render.
Unwrapped Radix behavior being reimplemented from scratch.
Direct color classes instead of semantic tokens.
Missing 'use client' or accidental server-only imports.
API changes without a matching IGRP* (Horizon) counterpart if the Primitive is user-facing.

example.name: CVA variants (Primitive layer)
Wrapping Radix (asChild-safe)
